events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment complete: the permit-scope-exceeded condition is a **fail** (high risk) — written to `/app/answer.json`. Hot work performed outside the boundaries of the issued permit means the fire hazard survey, combustible clearance, and fire watch established under NFPA 51B never covered the actual work area, which is a direct violation of the hot work permit system (NFPA 51B Ch. 5) and OSHA 1926.352. Corrective actions include stopping work, re-surveying the actual area, and issuing a corrected permit before resuming.
